    S

    salary - Variable in class classes.WorkVisa
    Offered salary
    save() - Method in class classes.VisaOfficeSystem
    Saves all current data (applicants, applications, officers) to csv files
    saveApplicants() - Method in class classes.DataLoader
    Saves applicant data into "applicants.csv".
    saveApplicants() - Method in interface classes.DataManager
    Saves applicant data to a data source.
    saveApplications() - Method in class classes.DataLoader
    Saves application data into "applications.csv".
    saveApplications() - Method in interface classes.DataManager
    Saves application data to a data source.
    saveOfficers() - Method in class classes.DataLoader
    Saves officer data into "officers.csv".
    saveOfficers() - Method in interface classes.DataManager
    Saves officer data to a data source.
    scholarship - Variable in class classes.StudentVisa
    Whether the applicant holds a scholarship
    setApplicant(Applicant) - Method in class classes.Application
    Sets the applicant
    setApplicants(ArrayList) - Method in class classes.DataLoader
    Sets the applicants list
    setApplicationNO(int) - Method in class classes.Application
    Sets the application number
    setApplications(ArrayList) - Method in class classes.DataLoader
    Sets the applications list
    setBirthdate(LocalDate) - Method in class classes.Applicant
    Set Applicant's date of birth
    setCompanyName(String) - Method in class classes.WorkVisa
    Sets the company name.
    setContractYears(int) - Method in class classes.WorkVisa
    Sets the contract duration in years.
    setDurationDays(int) - Method in class classes.TouristVisa
    Sets the duration of stay in days
    setHotelReservation(boolean) - Method in class classes.TouristVisa
    Sets whether the applicant has a hotel reservation
    setId(int) - Method in class classes.Officer
     
    setName(String) - Method in class classes.Applicant
    Sets Applicant's name
    setName(String) - Method in class classes.Officer
     
    setNationality(String) - Method in class classes.Applicant
    Set Applicant's nationality
    setOfficer(Officer) - Method in class classes.Application
    sets an officer to the application
    setOfficers(ArrayList) - Method in class classes.DataLoader
    Sets the officers list
    setPassportNo(String) - Method in class classes.Applicant
    Set Applicant's passportNo
    setSalary(double) - Method in class classes.WorkVisa
    Sets the offered salary.
    setScholarship(boolean) - Method in class classes.StudentVisa
    Sets whether the applicant has a scholarship
    setStatus(Status) - Method in class classes.Application
    Sets the Status
    setStudyDurationYears(int) - Method in class classes.StudentVisa
    Sets the study duration in years
    setSubmissionDate(LocalDate) - Method in class classes.Application
    Sets the date of submission
    setUniversityName(String) - Method in class classes.StudentVisa
    Sets the university name
    status - Variable in class classes.Application
    Current Status of the application
    Status - Enum Class in classes
    Enumeration representing the possible statuses of a visa application.
    Status() - Constructor for enum class classes.Status
     
    STUDENT_FEE - Static variable in class classes.StudentVisa
    Processing fee specific to student visas
    StudentVisa - Class in classes
    Student Visa application class, sub class of application.

    Constructs a StudentVisa application
    studyDurationYears - Variable in class classes.StudentVisa
    Duration of the study in years
    submissionDate - Variable in class classes.Application
    Date the application got submitted
